_comments: Binds JSONType metadata to AIRemoteBrowserProvider.SupportedFeatures so CodeGen emits a
typed accessor conforming to IRemoteBrowserProviderFeatures. Apply AFTER the v5.42
AI_Remote_Browser_Providers migration + CodeGen have created the 'MJ: AI Remote Browser
Providers' entity and its fields. If CodeGen names the entity differently, update the
SupportedFeatures field — strongly-typed remote-browser backend capability flags

primaryKey.ID: @lookup:MJ: Entity Fields.EntityID=@lookup:MJ: Entities.Name=MJ: AI Remote Browser Providers&Name=SupportedFeatures
